database.note: PostgreSQL connection. Set DATABASE_URL env var to override (takes precedence). Tables are created automatically on first run; if a legacy data/db.json exists it is imported once as a migration.

auth.note: Sessions expire after this many minutes of inactivity (sliding window) and persist to data/sessions.json across restarts.

sso.note: mode 'stub' accepts any @allowedDomain email (demo). Set mode 'entra' plus tenantId/clientId and implement verifyEntraToken() in server.js for production Microsoft Entra ID validation.

businessCentral.note: Set enabled=true and confirm the published OData service that holds the print Job# + item. Adapter runs server-side (on-prem server can reach BC).

notify.note: Paste a Teams Incoming Webhook URL and/or SMTP details to enable hold/reject alerts.

tolerances.note: Used for auto pass/fail flags. Edit in Admin > Tolerances.
